---
title: 'Vision'
date: '2012-02-09T06:54:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: '1520923594909568292'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6265309938258368992'
blogger_filename: '/p/vision.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/1520923594909568292/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/olivier-and-julie-48bb15ce42f3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/olivier-and-julie-927a14165071.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
&nbsp;<b>Olivier's Vision</b></div>
<br />
Summary:<br />
<br />
Key Scriptures:<br />
<br />
Vision:<br />
<br />
I see: My Role as Husband...<br />
<br />
I see: My Role as Father...<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/father-and-son-add2b43ded5a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/father-and-son-f81928ef4493.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
I see:
<br />
<br />
I see:
<br />
<br />
